scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "api,web" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "PORT=8082 pnpm --filter @workspace/backend run dev" "PORT=5000 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/frontend run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./backend" --filter "./frontend" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
